parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Weekly Rewards to Vaults

actor User
actor Ops
participant "Emissions Controller" as EC <<mStable>>
participant Vaults <<mStable>>
participant MTA <<mStable>>

User -> EC : setVoterDialWeights ([dial ids], [weights])
activate EC
note right of EC
  proportions voting power across dials
  for future distributions
end note
EC -->> User
deactivate EC

== After Thursday 00:00 UTC ==

Ops -> EC : calculateRewards ()
activate EC
note right of EC
  Calculates and stores
  rewards for each dial
end note
EC -->> Ops
deactivate EC

Ops -> EC : distributeRewards ([dial ids])
activate EC
loop Dials
  note right of EC
    transfer MTA
    from Emissions Controller
    to Vault
  end note
  EC -> MTA : transfer(vault, rewards)
  activate MTA
  MTA -->> EC
  deactivate MTA
  
  EC -> Vaults : notifyRewardAmount(rewards)
  activate Vaults
  note right of Vaults
    Stream MTA to Users
  end note
  Vaults -->> EC
  deactivate Vaults
end
EC -->> Ops
deactivate EC

== After rewards have accrued ==

User -> Vaults : claimRewards ()
activate Vaults
note left of Vaults
  transfer MTA
  from Vault
  to User
end note
Vaults -> MTA : transfer(user, rewards)
activate MTA
MTA -->> Vaults
deactivate MTA
Vaults -->> User
deactivate Vaults

@enduml
```
